# flexicon

> Python library for accessing FieldWorks Language Explorer (FLEx) projects via
> the SIL Language and Culture Model (LCM) API. flexicon handles FLEx engine
> initialization and provides the `FLExProject` class for opening a project and
> performing CRUD operations across Grammar, Lexicon, Texts & Words, Notebook,
> Lists, and System domains. Wrapper classes and smart collections hide LCM
> casting complexity so polymorphic types work without manual `ClassName` checks.

Install with `pip install pyflexicon`; import as `flexicon`. Requires Python
3.8-3.13, pythonnet 3.0.3+, and FieldWorks Language Explorer 9.0.17-9.3.1. The
Python architecture (32/64-bit) must match the installed FieldWorks. The legacy
`flexlibs2` import name still works as a deprecated alias (removed in v5.0.0).

Quickstart:

```python
import flexicon
flexicon.FLExInitialize()
project = flexicon.FLExProject()
project.OpenProject("MyProject", writeEnabled=True)

entry = project.LexEntry.Create("run", "stem")
sense = project.LexEntry.AddSense(entry, "to move rapidly on foot")
project.Senses.SetGloss(sense, "run", "en")

project.CloseProject()
flexicon.FLExCleanup()
```

## Getting Started

- [README](README.rst): Installation, requirements, and basic usage.
- [Migration Guide](docs/MIGRATION_GUIDE.md): Upgrading from flexlibs / flexlibs2.
- [Architecture Overview](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): Wrapper + smart-collection design.

## API Reference

- [API Surface](docs/API_SURFACE.md): The public API at a glance.
- [Function Reference](docs/FUNCTION_REFERENCE.md): Comprehensive per-operation reference.
- [Full HTML API docs](https://flexicon.langtech.cloud): Rendered Sphinx documentation.

## Core Concepts

- [Wrapper Classes](docs/ARCHITECTURE_WRAPPERS.md): Transparent casting over polymorphic LCM types.
- [Smart Collections](docs/ARCHITECTURE_COLLECTIONS.md): Type-aware filtering and display.
- [Exception Handling](docs/EXCEPTION_HANDLING.md): FLEx-specific error patterns.
- [Transactions](docs/TRANSACTION_GUIDE.md): Safe rollback of batched operations.
- [Custom Fields](docs/CUSTOM_FIELDS.md): Workflow and transaction safety.
- [Catalog Conventions](docs/CATALOG_CONVENTIONS.md): Possibility-list conventions.
- [Linguistic Safety](docs/LINGUISTIC_SAFETY_GUIDE.md): Guardrails for linguistic data.
- [Known API Issues](docs/API_ISSUES_CATEGORIZED.md): Documented LCM quirks and workarounds.
